title: BROADN slice LayoutDescriptor set
description: Per-slice declarative widget layouts for the BROADN dashboard. One LayoutDescriptor per project (and a safe default), interpreted by a single renderSlice(descriptor). Formalizes docs/COMPLEXITY-PER-PROJECT-MATRIX.md §4. Layouts describe STRUCTURE only; banner prose/people/publications live in PROJECT_CONTENT (no duplication, no fabrication).

slice_key_field.description: lookup key, e.g. project_id / site_code / group_name (matrix §4.2g hazard 1)

slice_label_field.description: display label field, kept separate from key (matrix §4.2g)

widgets.description: ORDERED top-to-bottom; not a fixed grid (matrix §4 hazard 2). Order encodes priority.

content_source.description: where prose/people/pubs hydrate from; default PROJECT_CONTENT

suppress_if_null.description: drop any chip whose source is null; never render blank (matrix §4.3)

no_fabricate.description: publication/data chips render only from a real accession/DOI (matrix §4.3)

absorbed_stats.description: facts cut from degenerate charts, surfaced as banner stats so nothing is lost (matrix §4.3)

id.description: stable widget key, unique within the layout

binds_entry.description: spec receives live slice entry, not pre-baked data (matrix §4.2h hazard 3)

show_if.description: render-condition over slice metadata (matrix §4.2b). Absent = always render.

DataBinding.description: binds a widget to a named metadata field / derived expression (matrix §4.2e)

source.description: field path, e.g. sample_types | sampler_type_dist | tag_groups.Position | tag_charts.Quadrant | type_pipeline_crossTab

denominator.description: explicit denominator for honest partial-coverage rendering (e.g. sample_count)

empty_state.description: literal text when the bound data is empty/zero — status, not a bug (matrix §4.2f)

unspecified_remainder.description: surface the unattributed count explicitly (sampler partial coverage)

ShowIf.description: A predicate over slice metadata. Exactly one of the predicate forms OR one composition key.
